title: BNI to use internal cash for IDR 905 billion buyback
body: BBNI will conduct a buyback of a maximum 10% of its shares worth IDR 905 billion.

title: Bank Jatim to issue long-term bonds: what's the aim?
body: "The implementation of 'Bank Jatim Incorporated' offers the opportunity for Bank Jatim to grow exponentially."

title: BRMS records net buy of 161.10 million shares
body: Two energy companies topped the net foreign buy rankings at the close of trading on Wednesday (5/2).

title: Competing with Johor Bahru, Indonesia's data centres must be AI-ready
body: AI could help to make Indonesia's data centre industry to thrive in order to be able to compete with neighbouring countries.

title: Pemberton Asian accumulates shares of PZZA, now holds 9.34%
body: Pemberton Asian raises stakes gradually in the managing company of Pizza Hut restaurant chain.
